the offer closed without trade; the east boundary sits differently for it

inventory.label: fragment of wild honeycomb (east sun-trap clearing)
inventory.notes: found cached on a low branch east of the mapped boundary; implies a bee colony somewhere further east; pale gold at the break, darker at the edges — not recent
